title: Xpeng Q4 2022 Earnings Preview: Wary Hopes on Recovery in 2023
text: The consensus EPS estimate for XPeng Q4 2022 was -$0.35 (-59.1% Y/Y) and the consensus revenue estimate was $774.44M (-42.2% Y/Y). Over the prior 2 years, XPEV had beaten EPS estimates 63% of the time and had beaten revenue estimates 75% of the time. Additionally, shares showed significant volatility on earnings days, jumping over +30% after the most recent results. Leading up to the Q4 2023 earnings announcement, the EV maker announced price cuts at the start of the year in an effort to boost sales after recording a 2.5% drop in 2022. The automaker was also looking to expand into Europe in 2023, and the stock was due to be added to multiple major indices in China during the month of March. JPMorgan warned in a downgrade in January that although XPeng should benefit from reopening trade for the Chinese automobile sector, it faced significant pricing competition in the mass segment.
